reviews.review_description:
Agree with other reviews:
- too few positions. 
- why does it start on some random wall that nothing to do with my safe zone.
Will get refund until updates made.
Was unable to start due to the games centre point being in the wall and it needing me to stand there

reviews.review_title: Random yoga postures, no proper instruct
reviews.review_description: Having practiced yoga on and off for 10+ years I was expecting a yoga class, a flowing session of multiple exercises with tips on how to safely flow from one pose to another. This app teaches nothing. There is no way to properly and safely move from one posture to another. No warm up, no cool down. It’s a disjointed series of ‘position your body like this’ without explaining how or why you should carefully move into this pose. Totally useless for beginners and can’t possibly help intermediate practitioners learn new poses. I am very disappointed. The developer didn’t even try to create a yoga class.  Don’t waste your time and money on this app.
I like it. Any update coming anytime soon?

It's an OK app I guess - but it can really use an update/more content.  There hasn't been an update in over a year!!!   I see the developer keeps on responding to these comments that an update is coming - but it never appears.   

So I ask the developer - when will this update be available?  (please provide an estimated month/year)

reviews.review_title: Cannot recentre the view in app.
reviews.review_description: This cpuld be quite good but the app almost always starts off to the right of centre of the room and i cannot get the view to recentre. Sometimes the yoga mat is the other side of the wall in my bedroom and sometimes its a magic carpet 2 feet off the ground. This has been a total waste of money as it just doesnt work as it should

reviews.review_title: Best of the yoga apps but
reviews.review_description: This one has possibilities. I was able to follow the poses and enjoyed the environment but too few poses offered. If I weren't in a wheelchair it would perhaps work for me but as it is, there isn't enough variety for me to find some I can do. High hopes for the future, though.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback and review! We will endeavour to add more poses and sessions. We will also think about how we can make it more accessible. We're glad you think that the app has potential. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Overall, I like the challenging  exercises, but the floating mini instructor ALWAYS in my face ruins the immersion. I wish this function could be disabled. Also, need a skip button. Let me customize the set I want
Its good, but could be better. Real scenes like real fishing vr has would be awesome instead of cartoon backgrounds with deer moon walking

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for trying our yoga experience and leaving us this feedback. We will check out the real scenes in real fishing vr for inspiration and try to incorporate this into the app soon. We will also address the animal walking issues you mentioned. Another user raised the idea to have an option to turn the animals off should they wish to so we are also considering this too. Thanks and have a wonderful Christmas!

reviews.review_description: This really has potential. It's off to a good start... more poses and being able to pick how long your yoga session would be added nice features. I really enjoy this app, but since content is so limited it could get old fast

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback and review! We understand your points about needing more poses and the ability to choose a duration for the session. We are working on addressing this. Thanks again for your feedback as this helps us understand the user perspective and what we should prioritize for product updates. Thanks! Alex from XR Sweat

reviews.review_description: Rough at the moment. But should be good. The guide moving about makes balance posses next to impossible. But other than that, it's on the right track.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback and appreciate the encouragement! This makes sense. We will shift around the levels to make the balance poses as part of the more challenging levels and keep the instructor still so it doesn't make it so hard. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I am a beginner and found not a lot of poses. I did love the ability to move to the instructors shadow and see where you needed to be. I see these being a great app with more poses and more than 8 in the easy series. I like that I could use the bypass or just the studio.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your great feedback and support! We are working on adding more poses soon to improve the experience. Thanks! Alex from XR Sweat

reviews.review_description: Tried repeatedly but wouldn’t go past open screen.

developer_response.body: Please ensure your hand tracking is switched on in settings while ensuring your controllers are outside of your boundary. Clicking can then be achieved by pointing with your right hand and bringing your thumb and index finger together. We hope we can help you try the app and that you may consider updating your review. We are a small team of two. If you have any further issues, please send your request to helloxrsweat@gmail.com

reviews.review_description:
This app is a great idea and has lots of potential but as an avid yogi, there is not enough variety in the exercises. I also don’t like that there is no transition between poses and not enough variety in the poses. 
I’ll keep it in the hopes that the improvements will be made soon.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. We are working on adding more poses soon to improve the experience. We will also have a think about how we can improve the transition between poses as you mentioned. Thanks! Alex from XR Sweat

reviews.review_description:
Downloaded this today to try out as I tend to do alot of my work outs through VR so was really curious to find a Yoga VR game rather than following Youtube videos. 

So this game does have lots of potential and I am going to keep using it so love to see updates that keep coming. I see this becoming very popular when it's more fleshed out! Keep it going! 😁😁

Things I really liked:
- The guided voice over is helpful and calming.
- Seeing the pose from within to fit yourself to it. 
- Environments and music bar seaside (see below in improvements)

Things I would love to see:
- More poses (probably an obvious one) haha.
- The ability to create my own playlist where I can select the poses that would best suit my needs when there is a bigger library to choose from. This would also really help for accessibility for people that can't perform certain poses. If you can see a rough time estimate on how long the session is based on the amount of poses you choose is a bonus as well. 

Improvements:
So I personally really like all the environments, forest being my favourite because puppies! The only one I am not keen on is the seaside one. I find the water sound to be too loud and quite annoying. Might be nicer to have the perspective from the beach with the sea in the background. I feel that would be alot more tranquil. Do appreciate the effort that went into the sealife so can understand if that one is a no go.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your encouragement and detailed feedback! This is extremely helpful to us as we continue to understand how we can make improvements to the experience. We are working on adding more poses and the option to make a customised session as our top priority, so hope to make these changes available soon. Showing the time for a session is a great idea, we will aim to include this soon too. 

We will further evaluate the environments based on your feedback-  we certainly hope to continuously improve these over time. We may be able to reduce the volume at the beach and offer options to position in different parts of the same location. 
Thanks! Alex from XR Sweat

reviews.review_description:
I like the idea of rotating instructor. Very useful.
The relaxing environments and the voice guidance makes it a relaxing yoga experience.
Even though there aren't that many poses yet, and the graphics can be more polished, it's pretty decent for a free APP.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great feedback. We are glad you enjoyed it! We look forward to improving the experience into the future. Thanks! Alex from XR Sweat

reviews.review_description: I have wanted to start doing yoga and my schedule is busy.  I was hoping for a few years now to find a VR yoga app that was like a popular fitness app I use, that lacks yoga.  This has a lot of potential to be a great yoga app, maybe with different time options, realistic scenes as well as ones like in this sample.  I only did the beginner poses, I had a hard time balancing on my right side.  One thing, the first pose incorrectly says go right, when it means left. So it tells you to go right twice.  Looking forward to more.  A yearly subscription with consistent new content would even be great.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great feedback! We are planning to release updated and new sessions within the next few weeks taking into account the difficulty of the balance poses, as well as fix up any errors in voice instructions. Brilliant ideas  - we will consider adding options for adjusting the pose times and realistic scenes. Thank you for your strong encouragement, this means a lot to our very small team :)

reviews.review_title: Can’t get past first screen! Please fix!
reviews.review_description:
Quest 3, I am fly about 4 meters above the ground and can’t do anything, I have big space, my area is setup and working correctly controllers are out of area.  Oculus reset position doesnt change anything. This needs fixing I note some other players have experienced same issues please fix or provide a way to reset your position.

Very disappointing

developer_response.body: Please ensure your hand tracking is switched on in settings while ensuring your controllers are outside of your boundary. Clicking can then be achieved by pointing with your right hand and bringing your thumb and index finger together. We hope we can help you try the app and that you may consider updating your review. We are a small team of two. If you have any further issues, please send your request to helloxrsweat@gmail.com

reviews.review_title: Great for a beginner like me.
reviews.review_description: I chose this yoga app due to being able to use pass-through and how it helps you line your body up in the correct position. It's also not a hound about me not having the position exactly right which I love!! I will get better after a few plays. I really enjoy this. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Glad you have really enjoyed it! This makes our very small team very happy that we have provided this experience for you. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
I recently took on the challenge of playing yoga video games for 30 days and this was by far the best one I tried. I love the mixed reality feature which makes it easy to step into the pose and if you do this in front of a mirror you can see how well your are executing each pose.

Request: I don't know if this is possible but maybe with the new body tracking if there is a way to score or give feedback on how well you are performing each pose. 

Here's the video incase you want to see how it plays in MR with a mirror and how much your flexibility can improve - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4GdJxzV13e4

developer_response.body: Love the video! We're so glad you enjoyed the mixed reality option and experienced improvements in flexibility. Feedback on pose performance is something we are considering in the future, although we are prioritising adding more sessions and poses in the short term.
